scope: Food category only: Tokyo vs Beijing representative basket. SL官方 only.
designPrinciple: Comparable representative basket: use shared or similar brands/services/consumption scenes, 5-10 representative examples per item where possible.

calculationPolicy.itemPrice: medianPrice in summary is the value the SameLife app should use for SL官方.
calculationPolicy.homeCooking: recipe_bundle_median based on raw ingredients and simple meal bundles.
calculationPolicy.slComprehensive: Not included. Generate later from a separate discounts/actual-payment file.
calculationPolicy.missingValues: No summary value is null. Some sample-level sourceUrl may still be blank for user-filled App/store values.
